realWorld: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, premium plans with payments, and admin analytics.
Create an analytics dashboard for subscription KPIs, alerts, segments, weekly reports, and viewer/admin roles.
Generate an e-commerce store with products, cart, checkout, orders, support role, and admin inventory.
Build software for schools with student profiles, attendance tracking, fee management, class records, and parent access.
Create a sales pipeline app for leads, deals, tasks, reporting, and manager approvals.
Build a reporting portal for metrics, alerts, saved reports, and analyst permissions.
Generate a customer support admin tool with tickets, users, reports, and role-based permissions.
Create a lightweight project tracker with projects, activities, reports, and team roles.
Build an online store with catalog, checkout, payments, admin, and support users.
Create a KPI monitor with metrics, segments, alert thresholds, and read-only viewers.
edgeCases: Create a dashboard but do not include reports and include reports
Build checkout without products or payments
Create admin software with no users
Build a system with unknown roles and no database
Create e-commerce with only a settings page
